LanguageData.VQED_DormantBattleDrone_Active.label: dormant battle drone
LanguageData.VQED_DormantBattleDrone_Active.descripti: An automated battle drone. It continuously patrols an area, looking for intruders. Once an intruder is found, it will relentlessly attack with a small stubgun.\n\nThis drone seems to be in a dormant state.
LanguageData.VQED_DormantRaiderDrone_Active.label: dormant raider drone
LanguageData.VQED_DormantRaiderDrone_Active.descripti: An automated drone designed for close-quarters raiding and heavy suppression. Equipped with a high-capacity rattlegun, its slow, heavily armored frame allows it to stand its ground and saturate an area with continuous fire, suppressing enemy positions.\n\nThis drone seems to be in a dormant state.
LanguageData.VQED_DormantHornetDrone_Active.label: dormant hornet drone
LanguageData.VQED_DormantHornetDrone_Active.descripti: An automated military drone for close-range defense and combat support. The drone is capable of piercing an enemy repeatedly with a long, hardened stinger. While it doesn’t carry the same paralytic as wasp drones, it’s capable of piercing heavy armor and dealing significant damage, while its heavy-duty armor plating allows it to withstand a lot of damage.\n\nThis drone seems to be in a dormant state.
LanguageData.VQE_ImmobilizedTurret.label: immobilized turret
LanguageData.VQE_ImmobilizedTurret.description: A broken down mobile turret. The old targeting mechanism still works.
LanguageData.VQE_ImmobilizedTurret_Bullet.label: mini-turret bullet
LanguageData.VQE_ImmobilizedTurret_Gun.label: immobilized turret
LanguageData.VQE_ImmobilizedTurret_Gun.description: A broken down mobile turret. The old targeting mechanism still works.
